heading: Integrations with other Azure Services
body:
- Azure Databricks: [Read and write to Atlas using Databricks and Apache Spark](https://docs.databricks.com/data/data-sources/mongodb.html)

- Azure Data Factory: [Copy data from or to MongoDB Atlas using Azure Data Factory or Synapse Analytics](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/data-factory/connector-mongodb-atlas)

- Azure Native Integration: [Create Atlas organizations from Azure, billed self-service](azure)
